properties.description: Dataflow to convert P6 Engineering data with unpivot per date

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		hid as string,
		{project no} as string,
		{project description} as string,
		{Activity ID} as string,
		{Activity Name} as string,
		{Original Duration} as string,
		{Actual Duration} as string,
		{Remaining Duration} as string,
		Start as string,
		Finish as string,
		{Actual Start} as string,
		{Actual Finish} as string,
		Calendar as string,
		{Budgeted Units} as string,
		{Actual Units} as string,
		{Remaining Units} as string,
		WBS as string,
		{WBS Name} as string,
		{Cost Account} as string,
		Role as string,
		{Resource ID} as string,
		{Resource ID Name} as string,
		{Resource Name} as string,
		{Resource Type} as string,
		{Total Float} as string,
		{Free Float} as string,
		{BL Project Start} as string,
		{BL Project Finish} as string,
		Critical as string,
		{Activity Type} as string,
		{Longest Path} as string,
		{Primary Constraint Date} as string,
		{Secondary Constraint Date} as string,
		{Primary Constraint} as string,
		{Secondary Constraint} as string,
		{Expected Finish} as string,
		{Suspend Date} as string,
		{Resume Date} as string,
		{BL Project Labor Units} as string,
		{Earned Value Labor Units} as string,
		{Planned Value Labor Units} as string,
		{BL Project Duration} as string,
		{Physical Percent Complete} as string,
		Predecessors as string,
		Successors as string,
		{Predecessor Details} as string,
		{Successors Details} as string,
		{Late Start} as string,
		{Late Finish} as string,
		{GLOBAL - CHANGE MANAGEMENT} as string,
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE} as string,
		{GLOBAL - FUNCTION} as string,
		{GLOBAL - MILESTONES} as string,
		{GLOBAL - OFFICE} as string,
		{GLOBAL - PHASE} as string,
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V11)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - REGION} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SCHEDULE RISK ASSESSMENT} as string,
		{GLOBAL - STORAGE SOLUTIONS} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V11)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SUPPLY CHAIN} as string,
		{Spreadsheet Field} as string,
		Period as string,
		{Period Value} as string,
		{created date time} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> SrcP6ResourceSpread
FltIncorrectActivity derive(PRIME = coalesce({GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V11)},{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)}),
		SUBPRIME = coalesce({GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V11)},{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)}),
		{Activity ID} = trim({Activity ID})) ~> dcGetProjectPrime
SrcP6ResourceSpread filter(!({Activity ID}=='No Activity ID'||isNull({Activity Name}))) ~> FltIncorrectActivity
dcGetProjectPrime sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:['p6_resource_spread_direct.csv'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		hid,
		{project no},
		{project description},
		{Activity ID},
		{Activity Name},
		{Original Duration},
		{Actual Duration},
		{Remaining Duration},
		Start,
		Finish,
		{Actual Start},
		{Actual Finish},
		Calendar,
		{Budgeted Units},
		{Actual Units},
		{Remaining Units},
		WBS,
		{WBS Name},
		{Cost Account},
		Role,
		{Resource ID},
		{Resource ID Name},
		{Resource Name},
		{Resource Type},
		{Total Float},
		{Free Float},
		{BL Project Start},
		{BL Project Finish},
		Critical,
		{Activity Type},
		{Longest Path},
		{Primary Constraint Date},
		{Secondary Constraint Date},
		{Primary Constraint},
		{Secondary Constraint},
		{Expected Finish},
		{Suspend Date},
		{Resume Date},
		{BL Project Labor Units},
		{Earned Value Labor Units},
		{Planned Value Labor Units},
		{BL Project Duration},
		{Physical Percent Complete},
		Predecessors,
		Successors,
		{Predecessor Details},
		{Successors Details},
		{Late Start},
		{Late Finish},
		{GLOBAL - CHANGE MANAGEMENT},
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE},
		{GLOBAL - FUNCTION},
		{GLOBAL - MILESTONES},
		{GLOBAL - OFFICE},
		{GLOBAL - PHASE},
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V11)},
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)},
		{GLOBAL - REGION},
		{GLOBAL - SCHEDULE RISK ASSESSMENT},
		{GLOBAL - STORAGE SOLUTIONS},
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V11)},
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)},
		{GLOBAL - SUPPLY CHAIN},
		{Spreadsheet Field},
		Period,
		{Period Value},
		{created date time},
		PRIME,
		SUBPRIME
	),
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> SnkP6ResourceSpread
